hooks.command: DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ "$(git -C "$DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ] || exit 0; git -C "$DIR" pull --ff-only >/dev/null 2>&1; true

DIR="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$PWD}"; git -C "$DIR" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || exit 0; [ "$(git -C "$DIR" symbolic-ref --short HEAD 2>/dev/null)" = "main" ] || exit 0; git -C "$DIR" add -A >/dev/null 2>&1; git -C "$DIR" diff --cached --quiet || git -C "$DIR" commit -q -m "chore: auto-commit (Claude Code session)" >/dev/null 2>&1; [ -n "$(git -C "$DIR" rev-list @{u}.. 2>/dev/null)" ] && git -C "$DIR" push -q >/dev/null 2>&1; true
hooks.statusMessage: main へ commit & push 中...
